SwitchHint: Click a switch to toggle it ON/OFF
DragHint: Drag from one terminal to another to create a wire
MoveHint: Drag a component to move it around
DeleteHint: Click the delete button, then click a component or wire to remove it
HintTitle: Click a component button to start building!
HintSubtitle: Add batteries, bulbs, and switches, then wire them together
TutorialAdd: Use the toolbar buttons to add batteries, bulbs, and switches
TutorialWire: Drag between terminals (dark circles) to connect wires
TutorialMove: Drag components to rearrange your circuit
TutorialSwitch: Click a switch to toggle it and control the circuit
TutorialDelete: Use the delete tool or right-click to remove wires
